mapper.select: select * from allergies order by allergy_id
select * from product_brands order by brand_id
select role from users where login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert:
insert into product_items( category_id, brand_id, name, description, status, image_url, price, weight, kcal, protein, sodium, sugar, saturated_fat, caffeine, created_at, informer_user_id) values ( #{categoryId}, #{brandId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{imageUrl}, #{price}, #{weight}, #{kcal}, #{protein}, #{sodium}, #{sugar}, #{saturatedFat}, #{caffeine}, now(), #{informerUserId}
)
mapper.select: select product_id from product_items where image_url = #{imageUrl}

select user_id,login_id,password,nickname,email,status,suspension_reason,created_at,updated_at,deleted_at from users
role = 'user'
and login_id like concat('%', #{searchMember}, '%')
and nickname like concat('%', #{searchMember}, '%')
and status = 'active'
and status = 'suspended'
and status = 'deleted'
order by created_at asc
order by created_at desc
limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from users
role = 'user'
and login_id like concat('%', #{searchMember}, '%')
and login_id like concat('%', #{searchMember}, '%')
and status = 'active'
and status = 'suspended'
and status = 'deleted'

select a.name as allergy_name, pa.allergy_id, product_allergy_id, brand_name, pi.product_id, category_id, pi.brand_id, pi.name , pi.description, status, image_url, price, weight, kcal, protein, sodium, sugar, saturated_fat, caffeine, created_at, updated_at, informer_user_id from product_items pi join product_allergies pa on pa.product_id=pi.product_id join allergies a on a.allergy_id = pa.allergy_id join product_brands pb on pb.brand_id = pi.brand_id where pa.product_id = #{productId}
select product_allergy_id,allergy_id from product_allergies where product_id=#{productId}
mapper.update:
update product_items description=#{description},status=#{status},price=#{price},weight=#{weight},kcal=#{kcal},protein=#{protein},sodium=#{sodium},sugar=#{sugar},saturated_fat=#{saturatedFat},caffeine=#{caffeine},informer_user_id=#{informerUserId},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
updated_at = now()
where product_id=#{productId}
mapper.delete: delete from product_allergies where allergy_id = #{allergyId} and product_id=#{productId}
mapper.select: select image_url from product_items where product_id = #{productId}
select login_id,nickname,email,status,suspension_reason,created_at,updated_at,deleted_at,profile_img from users where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: update users set status='suspended', suspension_reason=#{suspensionReason}, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update user_reports set processed_by = #{processedBy},completed_at = now(), status = "resolved" ,admin_note = #{adminNote} where report_id=#{reportId}
mapper.select: select target_user_id, end_date,report_id from user_suspension us join users u on us.target_user_id=u.user_id where end_date <= now() and status='suspended'
mapper.update: update users set status='active', suspension_reason = null, updated_at = now() where user_id=#{userId}

update user_reports set status='rejected',admin_note=#{adminNote}, completed_at = now(),processed_by=#{processedBy} where report_id != #{reportId} and target_user_id = #{targetUserId} and status = 'pending'
update posts set status='hidden',updated_at =now() where post_id=#{postId}
update post_reports set status='rejected',completed_at=now(),processed_by=#{processedBy},admin_note=#{adminNote} where report_id != #{reportId} and post_id=#{postId} and status='pending'
update grams set status = 'hidden',updated_at =now() where gram_id = #{gramId}
update gram_reports set status = 'resolved',completed_at =now(),admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy} where report_id=#{reportId}
update gram_reports set status='rejected',completed_at =now(), admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy} where report_id!=#{reportId} and gram_id =#{gramId} and status ='pending'
update post_reports set status='rejected',completed_at =now(), admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy} where post_id =#{postId} and status='pending'
update gram_reports set status='rejected',completed_at =now(), admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy} where gram_id =#{gramId} and status='pending'
update user_reports set status='rejected',completed_at =now(), admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy} where target_user_id =#{targetUserId} and status='pending'
mapper.select: select count(*) from users;
select count(*) from users where status='active' and DATE_ADD(created_at,interval 1 month) > now()
select count(*) from users where status='deleted' and Date_ADD(deleted_at,interval 1 month) > now()

select sum(cnt) from( select count(*) as cnt from post_reports where status ='pending' union all select count(*) as cnt from user_reports where status ='pending' union all select count(*) as cnt from gram_reports where status ='pending' ) report
select count(*) from product_items
select count(*) from product_brands

select * from( select report_id,ps.user_id,ps.post_id as target_id,reason,ps.status,ps.created_at, 'post' as report_type, title as title_name,reason as suspension_reason from post_reports ps join posts p on ps.post_id=p.post_id where ps.status='pending' union all select report_id,ur.user_id,target_user_id as target_id,reason,ur.status,ur.created_at,'user' as report_type,login_id as title_name,reason as suspension_reason from user_reports ur join users u on u.user_id=ur.user_id where ur.status='pending' union all select report_id,gr.user_id,gr.gram_id as target_id,reason,gr.status,gr.created_at, 'gram' as report_type,title as title_name,reason as suspension_reason from gram_reports gr join grams g on g.gram_id=gr.gram_id where gr.status ='pending' union all select suggestion_id as report_id,pfs.user_id,product_id as target_id,user_note as reason,pfs.status,created_at,'suggestion' as report_type,(select name from product_items pi where pi.product_id=pfs.product_id) as title_name,user_note as suspension_reason from product_suggestions pfs where pfs.status='pending' ) reports order by created_at asc limit 5
select count(*) from product_suggestions where status=#{status}

select suggestion_id,ps.user_id,login_id,ps.product_id,name,user_note,ps.status,ps.created_at from product_suggestions ps join product_items pi on ps.product_id=pi.product_id join users u on ps.user_id =u.user_id where ps.status=#{status} order by ps.created_at asc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update product_suggestions set admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy}, completed_at=now(),status='resolved' where suggestion_id=#{suggestionId}
update product_suggestions set admin_note=#{adminNote},processed_by=#{processedBy}, completed_at=now(),status='rejected' where suggestion_id=#{suggestionId}
mapper.select: select * from( select post_id,p.user_id,login_id,title,p.created_at from posts p join users u on p.user_id=u.user_id where p.status = 'active' union all select gram_id,g.user_id,login_id,title,g.created_at from grams g join users u on u.user_id=g.user_id where g.status = 'active' ) results order by created_at desc limit 5
select count(*) from grams;
select count(*) from posts;
